brief.title: Brief
brief.body: You describe the task. I ask questions.

scope.title: Scope
scope.body: I return with scope and price within 24 hours.

build.title: Build
build.body: Iterations every 2–3 days. You stay in the loop.

ship.title: Ship
ship.body: Live on schedule. The code stays yours.

points.delivery: Weekly delivery with a fixed scope
points.handoff: Readable handoff for the next developer

paragraphs.one: I build web products — interfaces, APIs, and the glue between them. Not pitch decks, not slideware. Stuff people actually click and pay for.
paragraphs.two: AI integrations are a big part of what I do. Not because it is trendy, but because a good bot or automation saves real hours when the backend and data are done right.
paragraphs.three: What sets me apart is straight talk and tight scope. I ship in small slices, keep you in the loop, and leave code that the next person can read without a map.

contact.title: Have a project in mind?
contact.sub: Let's figure out if we're a good fit.

corten-platform.description: Full-stack product shell with auth, billing, and admin.

signal-api.description: Realtime metrics gateway for ops dashboards.

forge-ai.description: Document workflows with RAG and tool routing.
forge-ai.outcome: MVP in 10 days · Used by 3 teams

atlas-commerce.description: Headless storefront with edge caching and CMS sync.

mono-system.description: Tokens, primitives, and docs for multi-brand delivery.
mono-system.outcome: Adopted across 4 products · In daily use
